title: Connecting the Location Column with the World Clock Column

posts.author: Huskydog (F)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a global business, managing our sophisticated equipment and services throughout the monday.com. Our customers complete a form in which we utilize the location column linked to Google’s address database. It would be highly advantageous if this column could connect to the World Clock, which is currently not very effective since it requires guesswork regarding the city recognized by the tool. This is quite disappointing. The World Clock is a valuable tool in facilitating contact with our customers, greatly assisting our agents.
